security-package.label: @monomind/security — Input validation, path validation, CVE remediation, safe execution
fixes_applied: Added validateExternalContent() to input-guards.ts — heuristic prompt-injection guard with 15 injection patterns, 3 encoding patterns, and directive-density check
Exported validateExternalContent and ExternalContentResult from index.ts
Created tests/security/input-guards.test.ts — 45 tests (34 validateInput + 11 validateExternalContent) discoverable by vitest
Cleaned stale dist artifacts: removed input-validator.*, input-guards.test.*, sandbox/ (no source backing)
Rebuilt dist with tsc --build to include new exports
remaining_gaps: validateInput() still has zero adoption outside the security package — consumers should call it for input sanitization
agent-tools.ts imports WasmSandbox/DockerSandbox/register/cleanup which do not exist — these try/catch silently fail
CLAUDE.md claims InputValidator (Zod-based), PathValidator, SafeExecutor — these are not in source (only stale dist had them)

cli-commands.label: @monomind/cli — 41 CLI commands
fixes_applied: Added 15 missing commands to the exported `commands` array in commands/index.ts (browse, config, completions, workflow, analyze, route, providers, claims, issues, update, process, replay, transfer-store, tokens, report-crash) — these were in loadedCommands but not registered with the parser or commandRegistry

Added missing re-exports for toObsidian, toCanvas, toMermaid from monograph export/obsidian.js, export/canvas.js, export/mermaid.js in monograph/src/index.ts — fixing TS2339 build errors in CLI's monograph-tools.ts
Rebuilt @monoes/monograph (clean tsc, zero errors) and @monoes/monomindcli (clean tsc --noEmit, zero errors)
remaining_gaps: hook-handler.cjs calls process.exit(0) at line 680 which triggers unhandled rejection in Vitest during init-helpers tests — pre-existing, cosmetic
The build script uses `tsc --noEmitOnError false || true` which masks any future TS errors — should be tightened
Dual-registry pattern (loadedCommands + commandRegistry + commands array) is fragile — should be consolidated to a single source of truth

daemon-system.label: Daemon — background worker management and lifecycle
fixes_applied: Copied orphaned test from packages/@monomind/cli/__tests__/services/worker-daemon-resource-thresholds.test.ts to tests/daemon/worker-daemon-resource-thresholds.test.ts with corrected import paths — 40 tests now pass and are discoverable by vitest

neural-system.label: Neural — pattern training and prediction
fixes_applied: Restored neural CLI source files from git history (neural.ts, neural-core.ts, neural-optimize.ts, neural-registry.ts) to packages/@monomind/cli/src/commands/
Registered neuralCommand in commands/index.ts (import, loadedCommands.set, export, commands array, commandsByCategory.advanced)
Verified tsc --noEmit compiles cleanly with zero errors
remaining_gaps: No tests for neural MCP tools (neural_train, neural_predict, neural_compress, neural_optimize, neural_patterns)
No tests for neural CLI commands (status, patterns, predict, optimize, list, export, import)
CLI patterns.json and MCP models.json are two separate stores that get mirrored best-effort — fragile dual-store pattern

skills-system.label: Skills — mastermind, monolean, monodesign, monomotion, superpowers skill files
fixes_applied: Fixed stale graphify_suggest/graphify_query references in mastermind/help.md — updated to monograph_suggest/monograph_query
remaining_gaps: 98 of ~170 skill files missing frontmatter description: field — affects skill listing quality but not function
3 macOS ._ resource forks in commands/mastermind/ (._code-review, ._okf-export, ._okf-import) show as phantom skills — covered by .gitignore, local-only artifact
4 macOS ._ resource forks in skills/mastermind-skills/ — same local artifact issue
swarm/swarm.md frontmatter name is 'swarm-swarm' instead of 'swarm:swarm' — inconsistency with naming convention
do.md is 525 lines, right at the 500-line project limit
